title: Avoiding Work
action: A stick figure sits at a desk with a notebook. The figure looks at the work, hesitates, notices a phone, picks it up, smiles while scrolling, then looks worried as a clock appears in the background.

title: Phone Distraction
action: A stick figure tries to read a book at a desk. A phone buzzes nearby. The figure reaches for the phone, scrolls briefly, then looks back at the book with a tired expression.

title: Overthinking Message
action: A stick figure holds a phone and stares at a blank message box. A thought bubble appears with question marks. The figure types, deletes, then hesitates with slumped shoulders.

title: Fear of Judgment
action: A stick figure stands near a simple door. Several faint stick figures appear as outlines in the background. The main figure hesitates, steps forward, then steps back.

title: Comparing With Others
action: A stick figure scrolls on a phone while another stick figure walks past with a confident posture. The scrolling figure slumps and looks down at the screen.

title: Reward Loop
action: A stick figure taps a phone, a small star appears, smiles, taps again, then repeats the motion in a simple looping rhythm beside a desk.

title: Comfort Zone Trap
action: A stick figure sits inside a simple drawn box. An arrow points outward toward an open door. The figure reaches toward the edge, then pulls back and sits down again.

title: Impulse Buying
action: A stick figure sees a small item on a simple counter, grabs it quickly with a smile, then looks at an empty wallet and frowns.

title: Decision Paralysis
action: A stick figure stands between two simple arrows pointing left and right. The figure looks back and forth, scratches head, and freezes in place.

title: People Pleasing
action: A stick figure nods eagerly at another stick figure, then turns away with a tired expression and a small thought bubble showing a frown.

title: Silent Resentment
action: Two stick figures stand facing each other. One speaks with a speech bubble. The other smiles stiffly, then turns aside with a tight jaw and crossed arms.

title: Confidence Shift
action: A stick figure starts with slumped shoulders by a chair, then slowly straightens posture, lifts chin, and takes one calm step forward.

title: Habit Trigger
action: A stick figure walks past a desk, sees a coffee cup, and automatically reaches for a phone without thinking. A simple loop arrow appears above.

title: Anxiety Spiral
action: A stick figure sits on a chair with a small thought bubble. The bubble grows with swirling lines. The figure holds head and curls inward slightly.

title: Small Win Motivation
action: A stick figure checks a single box on a simple list, smiles, and takes one energetic step forward with a small star above the head.

title: Deadline Panic
action: A stick figure sits at a desk with an untouched notebook. A large clock appears behind. The figure jumps up and frantically scribbles.

title: Social Media Loop
action: A stick figure scrolls on a phone in a repeating motion. A circular arrow appears above the phone. The figure blinks slowly and keeps scrolling.

title: Temptation Resistance
action: A stick figure reaches toward a snack on a desk, pauses, pulls hand back, and drinks water from a simple cup instead.

title: Regret After Choice
action: A stick figure makes a quick choice between two simple items, smiles briefly, then looks down with a regretful expression and slumped shoulders.

title: Learning From Failure
action: A stick figure falls beside a simple box, sits up, draws a small arrow on paper, then stands and tries again with calmer posture.
